prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing.
If this page is part of the Table of Contents (it lists Items with their page numbers), output one line per entry in exactly this form:
  <item> | <page>
where <item> is the Item identifier exactly as printed (e.g. 1, 1A, 7A) and <page> is its printed page number. Include every Item row visible on this page, in order. Output ONLY these lines.
If this page is NOT a table of contents, output exactly: NONE
